medical_history.history_of_present_illness: The patient woke up at 2am with sudden onset of pain across the chest, took 2 NTG with relief. Experienced sharp mid back pain during ambulance transport; received NTG with relief again. Initial vitals in ED: 96.8, 136/83, 77, 16, 97% on 2LNC. Recent admission for cardiac cath after positive stress test showing moderate fixed perfusion defect. Had diaphoresis in ED, resolved. Complained of dyspnea on exertion for 6 months, with stability in sleeping position. Occasional palpitations and 'dizzy spells' when changing positions.
medical_history.past_medical_history: CAD, s/p IMI and CABG x 3, Hyperlipidemia, Hypertension, Hypothyroidism, Atrial fibrillation, History of lower extremity DVT, Obesity, BPH, GERD post bilateral TKR, Anxiety/Depression, Pituitary adenoma post transsphenoidal surgery, Hypogonadism, Iron deficiency anemia.
medical_history.family_history: Father had MI (died age Not specified), mother died of stomach cancer, brothers died of stomach cancer, lung cancer, throat cancer; mother and sisters' health statuses unspecified.

physical_examination.general_examination: Vital signs: 98.3, 142/87, 72, 20, 95% on RA. Patient is well-developed, well-nourished male in no acute distress. Mood and affect appropriate.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Cardiovascular: Regular rate, normal S1, S2; no murmurs, rubs, or gallops. Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally, no abnormal sounds.
